description_long: This object depicts a pair of modern, two-story residential houses set side by side, each with a flat roof and a fenced yard. The exterior walls are finished in a light tan brick pattern, with large rectangular windows distributed across the facades. The houses are separated by a central driveway and feature small green lawns in both the front and rear, enclosed by wooden fencing. One house has a visible cylindrical water tank in the backyard, while the other has a more open rear lawn. The roofs are flat and appear to have minimal detailing, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. The overall layout suggests a suburban or urban neighborhood setting, with paved access and clear property boundaries.
description: A pair of modern, flat-roofed two-story houses with tan brick exteriors, large windows, fenced yards, and a central driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facades, large windows, and fenced green lawns.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the central driveway, rear yards, and cylindrical water tank.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear facades, additional windows, and fenced lawns.
description_view_3: Opposite side/rear view with a clear look at the driveway, water tank, and side walls.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entryways with standard doors, no porch or overhang, and direct access from the fenced front lawns
